label: Cloud computing services by size class of enterprise

size_emp.label: Size classes in number of persons employed

nace_r2.label: Statistical classification of economic activities in the European Community (NACE Rev. 2)

categories.C10-S951_X_K: All activities (except agriculture, forestry and fishing, and mining and quarrying), without financial sector

categories.E_CC: Enterprises using paid cloud computing services used over the internet
categories.E_CC_PEM: Enterprises using e-mail (as a paid CC service)
categories.E_CC_PSOFT: Enterprises using office software (e.g. word processors, spreadsheets, etc.) (as a paid CC service)
categories.E_CC_PDB: Enterprises using hosting for the enterprise's database (as a paid CC service)
categories.E_CC_PFIL: Enterprises using storage of files (as a paid CC service)
categories.E_CC_PFACC: Enterprises using finance or accounting software applications (as a paid CC service)
categories.E_CC_PCRM: Enterprises using CRM software (as a paid CC service)
categories.E_CC_PCPU: Enterprises using computing power to run the enterprise's own software (as a paid CC service)
categories.E_CC_PERP: Enterprises using ERP software applications (as a paid CC service)
categories.E_CC_PSEC: Enterprises using security software applications (as a paid CC service)
categories.E_CC_PDEV: Enterprises using computing platform providing a hosted environment for application development, testing or deployment (as a paid CC service)
categories.E_CC_PANY: Buy at least one of the mentioned CC services - until 2020 (E_CC_PEM, E_CC_PSOFT, E_CC_PDB, E_CC_PFIL, E_CC_PFACC, E_CC_PCRM, E_CC_PCPU)
categories.E_CC_PNONE: Don't buy any of the mentioned CC services - until 2020 (E_CC_PEM, E_CC_PSOFT, E_CC_PDB, E_CC_PFIL, E_CC_PFACC, E_CC_PCRM, E_CC_PCPU)
categories.E_CC1_PANY: Enterprises using at least one of the paid CC services: CC_PEM, CC_PSOFT, CC_PFACC, CC_PERP, CC_PCRM, CC_PSEC, CC_PDB, CC_PFIL, CC_PCPU, CC_PDEV
categories.E_CC1_PNONE: Enterprises not using any of the paid CC services: CC_PEM, CC_PSOFT, CC_PFACC, CC_PERP, CC_PCRM, CC_PSEC, CC_PDB, CC_PFIL, CC_PCPU, CC_PDEV
categories.E_CC_LO: Buy only low CC services - until 2020 (e-mail, office software, storage of files)
categories.E_CC_ME: Buy only medium CC services - until 2020 (e-mail, office software, storage of files, hosting of the enterprise's database)
categories.E_CC_HI: Buy high CC services - until 2020 (accounting software applications, CRM software, computing power)
categories.E_CC1_B: Enterprises using only basic paid CC services, at least one of: CC_PEM, CC_PSOFT, CC_PFIL, CC_PCPU
categories.E_CC1_I: Enterprises using at most  intermediate paid CC services, at least one of: CC_PFACC, CC_PERP, CC_PCRMCC_PCRM
categories.E_CC1_S: Enterprises using sophisticated paid CC services, at least one of: CC_PSEC, CC_PDB, CC_PDEV
categories.E_CC1_BI: Enterprises using basic or intermediate paid CC services, at least one of:  CC_PEM, CC_PSOFT, CC_PFIL, CC_PCPU, CC_PFACC, CC_PERP, CC_PCRM
categories.E_CC1_SI: Enterprises using sophisticated or intermediate paid CC services, at least one of: CC_PFACC, CC_PERP, CC_PCRM, CC_PSEC, CC_PDB, CC_PDEV
categories.E_CC1_SS_GE1: Enterprises using at least one of the paid CC software services: CC_PEM, CC_PSOFT, CC_PFACC, CC_PERP, CC_PCRM, CC_PSEC
categories.E_CC1_IS_GE1: Enterprises using at least one of the paid CC infrastructure service: CC_PDB, CC_PFIL, CC_PCPU
categories.E_CC1_PS: Enterprises using paid CC platform services: CC_PDEV
categories.E_CC_IOT: Enterprises buying CC services and using IoT (until 2021)
categories.E_CC_IOTX: Enterprises buying CC services but not using IoT (until 2021)
categories.E_CC_DA: Enterprises using paid cloud computing services and perform data analytics
categories.E_CC_PDBFIL: Enterprises using hosting for the enterprise's database(s) or storage of files (as a paid CC service)
categories.E_CC_PHW: Enterprises using hosting for the enterprise's database(s) or storage of files or computing power (as a paid CC service)

categories.PC_ENT_CC: Percentage of enterprises using paid CC services
categories.PC_ENT_CUSE: Percentage of the enterprises which use a computer
categories.PC_ENT_IUSE: Percentage of enterprises where persons employed have access to the internet
categories.PC_ENT_IACC: Percentage of the enterprises with internet access
